headline: Ameriprise Financial (NYSE:AMP) Reports Upbeat Q1 CY2026
summary: Financial services company Ameriprise Financial (NYSE:AMP) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 13.4% year on year to $4.89 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $11.26 per share was 10.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Dow Falls 600 Points. Oil Prices Just Spiked.
summary: Stocks fell suddenly Thursday afternoon following a spike in oil prices. The Dow dropped 600 points, or 1%. The S&P 500 fell 1.3%. The Nasdaq dropped 1.8%. WTI crude oil futures jumped 4.6% to $97.27 a barrel, while Brent crude jumped 4.

headline: American Express (AXP), The Longest-Held Position of Warren Buffett; See Why
summary: American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is one of the best Warren Buffett stocks. During the initial wave of consumer credit in the 1960s, American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) drew Buffett’s attention, prompting his acquisition of a 5% stake in the company. The company remains one of Berkshire Hathaway’s longest-held positions, appreciating significantly over the years. As of […]

headline: Amex (AXP) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Stephen Squeri: Thank you, Kartik.  Card Member spending grew 10% on a reported basis, and this is the highest quarterly growth in three years, driven by strong growth across both goods and services and T&E. We continue to see strong demand and engagement with our premium products across our customer base.  Based on our strong results to date and our confidence going forward, we have decided to increase our investments in marketing and technology to capitalize on key growth opportunities and build on our momentum.

raw.headline: Amex (AXP) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
raw.summary: Stephen Squeri: Thank you, Kartik.  Card Member spending grew 10% on a reported basis, and this is the highest quarterly growth in three years, driven by strong growth across both goods and services and T&E. We continue to see strong demand and engagement with our premium products across our customer base.  Based on our strong results to date and our confidence going forward, we have decided to increase our investments in marketing and technology to capitalize on key growth opportunities and build on our momentum.

headline: Warner Bros. shareholders approve $110B sale to Paramount

(WBD) investors voted to approve the $110 billion sale to Paramount Skydance (PSKY). American Airlines (AAL) cut its profit forecast due to higher fuel prices. headline: American Express Profit Jumps 15%, Topping Wall Street’s Estimates
summary: American Express  said its profit increased by 15% from a year ago as spending by its typically affluent cardmembers grew at the highest quarterly rate in three years.  The New York-based firm said net income in the first quarter rose to $2.97 billion from $2.58 billion a year earlier.  American Express left its financial guidance for 2026 unchanged.
